texto: I cannot bear to associate with the ordinary run of people. I have to surround myself with individuals who for the most part are more than a trifle insane
explicacao: Orientação direta de Wallace Thurman sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “I cannot bear to associate with the ordinary run of people. I have to surround myself with indivi…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amizade, humor, insanity, útil em momentos de humor e insanity.

frase_original: I cannot bear to associate with the ordinary run of people. I have to surround myself with individuals who for the most part are more than a trifle insane

texto: Beloved, we join hands here to pray for gin. An aridity defiles us. Our innards thirst for the juice of juniper. Something must be done. The drought threatens to destroy us. Surely, God who let manna fall from the heavens so that the holy children of Israel might eat, will not let the equally holy children of Niggeratti Manor die from the want of a little gin. Children, let us pray.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Wallace Thurman sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Beloved, we join hands here to pray for gin. An aridity defiles us. Our innards thirst for the ju…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, alcohol, gin, útil em momentos de gin e liquor.

Surely, God who let manna fall from the heavens so that the holy children of Israel might eat, will not let the equally holy children of Niggeratti Manor die from the want of a little gin. Children, let us pray.
